items.title: IowaBio panel discussion
items.description: Ratul Chowdhury joins an Iowa Biotechnology Association panel discussion alongside Erin Rollenhagen, Reid Forgrave, and Matthew Smalley.

items.title: Anionic hairy cellulose nanocrystals
items.description: Research highlight on cellulose nanocrystal engineering, showing the pathway from cellulose fibrils to anionic hairy cellulose nanocrystals and related characterization results.

items.title: Seq2Bind feature extraction
items.description: Research overview of the Seq2Bind framework, highlighting protein language model embeddings and feature extraction for protein-protein binding affinity prediction.

items.title: PixF fluorescence analytics suite
items.description: Software and methods highlight for PixF, a pixel-based fluorescence analytics suite for image segmentation, color picking, and analyzer workflows in microscopy data.

items.title: Department of Energy showcase visit
items.description: Conference and networking update featuring a visit to the U.S. Department of Energy National Laboratories showcase floor.

items.title: Protein structure modeling preview
items.description: Computational protein design and structural biology update featuring a dynamic molecular structure visualization.
